title: Path Sum
pattern: Tree â€” Root-to-Leaf Recursive Sum Check
coreIdea: Determine if a root-to-leaf path exists summing exactly to a target, by recursively subtracting the current node's value from the target and checking leaves for a remaining value of exactly zero.
recognitionCues: asks if a root-to-leaf path summing to a target exists
simplest tree + DP-like recursion problem, common warm-up
approach: Base case: if node is null, return false. If node is a leaf, return true only if node.val equals remaining target. Otherwise, recursively check left OR right subtree with target reduced by node.val.
